title: Naseeb
desc: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev. Years later, Namdev returns to seek revenge.

title: Hogi Pyar Ki Jeet
desc: Two brothers reunite in order to fulfil the wish of their dying father whom Thakur bitterly humiliates and murders. They intend to marry Thakur's two daughters to seek revenge.

desc: Preeti courageously shares her story in court but faces backlash when the perpetrator strikes again. Now, she's not only battling her trauma but also dealing with her family's rejection.

desc: Pratap, a gambler disowned by his family, comes under the care of a landlord named Laxminath. When corrupt forces lead to Laxminath's murder, Pratap seeks revenge.
